import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { toast } from "react-toastify"; export default function Footer() { const showInfo = (topic) => { const info = { 'Twitter': 'Follow NexTrade on Twitter for real-time market updates and company news.', 'Facebook': 'Join our Facebook community to connect with other investors and share insights.', 'LinkedIn': 'Connect with NexTrade on LinkedIn for professional updates and career opportunities.', 'Instagram': 'Follow our Instagram for financial tips, market trends, and educational content.', 'About': 'NexTrade is India\'s fastest-growing investment platform, built on the principles of transparency and user-centric design.', 'Pricing': 'We offer a zero-commission model for core investments and transparent, low fees for advanced trading tools.', 'Blog': 'Visit NexTrade Insights for regular articles on market analysis, investment strategies, and financial literacy.', 'Careers': 'Join the team building the future of fintech. We\'re always looking for talented engineers and designers.', 'Safety': 'Your security is our top priority. We use 256-bit encryption and multi-factor authentication for all accounts.', 'Privacy': 'We respect your privacy. Your data is encrypted and never shared with third parties without your consent.', 'Help': 'Visit our 24/7 Support Center for FAQs, guides, and contact details for our expert support team.' }; toast.info(info[topic] || `Information about ${topic} will be available soon!`, { position: "bottom-right" }); }; return (
{/* Logo & Info */}
{ e.target.style.display = 'none'; }} /> NexTrade

Level 18, One BKC Tower,
Bandra Kurla Complex,
Mumbai – 400 051

{['Twitter', 'Facebook', 'LinkedIn', 'Instagram'].map(social => (
showInfo(social)} className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-[#f8f8f9] flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-primary/10 hover:text-primary transition-all cursor-pointer group" > {social[0]}
))}
